metadata.name: BRAS CR2 spectral calibration — unified pipeline
metadata.note: Calibration barely moved scale factors — catalog materials already correct. 250Hz failure is physics-limited (statistical modes cannot represent actual room mode shapes below Schroeder frequency). Needs eigensolve-based ModalROMProvider.

comparison_vs_old_hybrid.note: Old hybrid used Butterworth crossover + ray tracer with single-frequency absorption. New unified pipeline eliminates crossover artifacts entirely.

diagnosis.250Hz_root_cause: Statistical modes (Weyl density fill) cannot represent actual room mode shapes at low frequencies. The Schroeder frequency for this room is ~260 Hz, so 250 Hz is firmly in the modal regime where exact eigensolve is required. The ModalROMProvider (eigensolve-based) achieved 0.6% T30 error at 250 Hz in previous tests.
diagnosis.4000Hz_root_cause: Air absorption may be overestimated at 4 kHz, or the statistical mode density approximation breaks down. The measured T30 decreases less steeply than the Eyring prediction with ISO 9613-1 air absorption at this frequency.
diagnosis.fix_250Hz: Use Room.build() + impulse_response_unified() with ModalROMProvider for eigensolve-based low-frequency modes
diagnosis.fix_4000Hz: Investigate air absorption model accuracy at 4 kHz; may need to extend axial modes to higher frequency or add ray tracer for diffuse high-frequency tail
